subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Hearing is a trust from the All-Merciful; keep it pure and sanctified from the words and intimations of them that are on earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز خدا سمع ودیعه رحمانست او را از کلمات و اشارات من علی الارض پاک و طاهر
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
